creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Created attachment 180109
textproc/py-markdown: Update to 2.6.8

Changelog
=========

*   Update to 2.6.8
*   Enable concurrent installs
*   Include devel/py-coverage in TEST_DEPENDS


QA
==

portlint: OK
poudriere: OK -- testport on 10.3-RELEASE-p14 w/py27 (default), py34, py35, py36


Notes
=====

TEST_DEPENDS follows test-requirements.txt from the upstream distribution, and coverage was previously omitted, I assume, because devel/py-coverage has been >4.0 since r415825 (2016-05-25). However, the reason for the version cap was for py32 support [0], which the ports tree lacks.

Speaking of TEST_DEPENDS (and do-test), I confess that don't actually know of a good way to run the test target because poudriere doesn't yet integrate with it [1]. Perhaps that maintainer will enlighten me.

[0] https://github.com/waylan/Python-Markdown/commit/20b17c2908177ba842ef4811721a1b247984263d
[1] https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/pull/355
